goal: Users can start a new conversation from any profile.
summary: Profile Integration phase complete. Added Message button to ProfilePage (visible only for other users' profiles), next to the Follow button. On click, calls useCreateConversation.mutateAsync to get or create a 1-on-1 conversation, then navigates to /chat/{conversationId}. Button shows loading spinner during creation. TypeScript compiles with 0 errors.
stepSummaries:
1. Add a Message button next to the Follow button on ProfilePage [verified]
  2. On click, call useCreateConversation to get or create a conversation with the target user, then navigate to the chat thread [verified]
  3. Type-check after changes [verified]
